title: Pan-Seared Skillet Beans with Canadian Runner Beans
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring Canadian runner beans, cooked to perfection in a skillet with a hint of citrus.

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: a large cast-iron or stainless steel skillet

instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil and swirl to coat the bottom.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the Canadian runner beans and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
